response.justification: This candidate is a strong full-stack TypeScript/Node.js engineer but is nearly disqualified on every mandatory criterion for this role. C++ experience is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a bachelor thesis side project — far below the 5–10 year requirement. No SQL Server or Oracle exposure is demonstrated; the candidate lists MongoDB and MySQL. There is no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain knowledge; the brief mention of RIDE Capital relates to retail investment tooling, not capital-markets infrastructure. The skills gap is too wide to bridge at a mid-senior consulting engagement.
strengths: Strong communication skills evidenced by workshops, public talks, and teaching engagements
Demonstrated CI/CD and DevOps experience across multiple roles
Broad multi-language background including Java, which is listed as a desirable optional skill
concerns: C++ experience totals roughly 6 months (National Instruments 2014–2015), against a 5–10 year mandatory requirement
Zero fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No SQL Server or Oracle background; primary database exposure is MongoDB and MySQL, which are irrelevant to the role
